tips_en: Start with Paper 1 (GAM) if your interest lies in robotics, or Paper 2 (DreamX-World) if generative video/world modeling is your focus—they are the most tightly connected, both advancing world-model architectures (causal transformers, geometric/spatial reasoning, long-horizon consistency) but in different modalities. Paper 3 (VibeThinker-3B) is more independent, targeting efficient reasoning in small LMs, but its test-time scaling ideas could complement agentic or planning layers in either world model.
tips_zh: 如果你的兴趣在机器人方向，建议先读论文1（GAM）；如果关注生成式视频与世界模型，则先读论文2（DreamX-World）——这两篇联系最紧密，都围绕世界模型架构（因果 Transformer、几何/空间推理、长时一致性）展开，只是模态不同。论文3（VibeThinker-3B）相对独立，聚焦小模型的高效推理，但其测试时扩展思想未来有望整合到上述世界模型的规划或智能体决策中。
